title: Scandinavian Main
pgn: 1.e4 d5 2. exd5 Qxd5 3. Nc3 Qa5 4. d4 Nf6 5. Nf3 c6 6. Bc4 Bf5 7. O-O e6 *

goals.title: Center Challenge
goals.description: Fight White's center at once and ask e4 a question. This opens active play and avoids letting White build freely.

goals.title: Pawn Recovery
goals.description: Win back the pawn and keep material equal. The queen is active now, so Black must be ready to move it again after Nc3.

goals.title: Safe Retreat
goals.description: Move the queen to a stable square and keep pressure along the a5-e1 line. If Black stays careless, White can gain time by attacking the queen again.

goals.title: Knight Develop
goals.description: Develop a piece, attack e4 ideas, and prepare quick castling. It also helps Black avoid falling behind while White builds the center.

goals.title: Solid Base
goals.description: Support the center setup and prepare ...Bf5 or ...Bg4 without allowing Nb5 ideas easily. Without this, White can pressure key squares faster.

goals.title: Bishop Activity
goals.description: Develop the bishop outside the pawn chain before ...e6. This improves piece activity and supports smooth kingside development.

goals.title: Close Center
goals.description: Strengthen the center, open the dark bishop's path, and prepare to castle or develop calmly. It also keeps Black's structure compact against White's active pieces.
